name: ai-footprint
description: Helps developers stay aware of AI over-reliance by tracking coding behavior and nudging when needed

commands.title: AI Footprint: Snooze Nudges for 30 Minutes

aiFootprint.enabled.description: Enable or disable AI Footprint monitoring.

aiFootprint.pasteThreshold.description: Number of lines added at once before an edit is classified as a paste.

aiFootprint.clipboardAware.description: Cross-check insertions against the OS clipboard for more accurate paste detection.

aiFootprint.showStatusBar.description: Show the live AI Footprint score in the status bar.

aiFootprint.quietWhileDebugging.description: Suppress nudges while a debug session is active.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
